nasb.text: But all the congregation said to stone them with stones. Then the glory of the Lord appeared in the tent of meeting to all the sons of Israel.

esv.text: Then all the congregation said to stone them with stones. But the glory of the Lord appeared at the tent of meeting to all the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 全體會眾都說要用石頭打死他們二人。這時，耶和華的榮光在會幕中向以色列眾人顯現。

ccb.text: 但全体会众威胁要用石头打死他们二人。这时耶和华的荣光在会幕中向以色列人显现。
